key_evidence: Frontier Governance Framework published May 28: covers CBRN, cyber, manipulation, loss-of-control; aligned with California Transparency in Frontier AI Act and EU AI Act Code of Practice
Framework includes model reporting, security risk management, incident response, external expert input mechanism
Concurrent: 'safely' mission-deletion confirmed structural post-PBC conversion
Front-group funding (Parents and Kids Safe AI Coalition) seeking liability shield — INT-negative
INT dimension crosses into Critical at 17.5 — first sub-dimension Critical entry for OpenAI
Net composite hold at 27.5; band-internal dimension rebalance captures genuinely-mixed trajectory

events.label: Frontier Governance Framework published — regulator-aligned public governance documentation

methodology_note: Net-zero composite with dimension rebalance. Framework publication offsets cumulative sub-threshold accumulation on ACC/AWR/ACT; mission deletion and front-group funding hold INT and BND down. INT enters Critical at 17.5 — meaningful sub-dimension signal at net-zero composite. Band-internal rebalance, not band change.
